meanings.definition: an aggressive attempt to compel acquiescence by the concentration or manipulation of power
examples: she laughed at this sexual power play and walked away

meanings.definition: a play in which there is a concentration of players in one location on the field of play
examples: they used a power play to return the kickoff

meanings.definition: (ice hockey) a play in which one team has a numerical advantage over the other as a result of penalties
examples: the team was unable to capitalize on the power play
